content_of_post_to_comment: My friends are starting to get married in their late twenties. I can already tell I’m going to be the friend housing friends going through a divorce and telling them to sign those papers.
comment: The friend who says “sign the papers” often gets cast as cynical, but sometimes they're the only person in the room distinguishing between saving a marriage and prolonging a stalemate. Those aren't always the same thing.
